title: Mitochondrial viability
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"15if","text":"Mitochondrial viability is determined through 2,3,5-triphenyltetrazolium chloride (TTC) conversion to insoluble formazan. TTC reduction depends on the mitochondrial respiratory activity and is proportional to the number of viable cells.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
